evidence_summary: Schema and validator files are present.
A historical schema-validation regression was found in commit evidence.

proposed_gates.name: Schema validation smoke
proposed_gates.failure_mode: An invalid active schema can be merged.
evidence: A prior commit records a schema-validation regression
proposed_gates.why_meaningful: It wires an existing deterministic validator into CI.
proposed_gates.owner_explanation_fa: این گیت اجازه نمی‌دهد schema خراب وارد شاخه اصلی شود.

rejected_gates.name: CodeQL default scan
rejected_gates.reason: No current evidence shows code-security scanning is the main failure mode for this personal contract repository.
rejected_gates.owner_explanation_fa: فعلاً خرابی اصلی این ریپو را نمی‌گیرد و هزینه اضافی ایجاد می‌کند.

deferred_gates.name: Python compatibility matrix
deferred_gates.reason: No current compatibility failure or supported-version contract justifies a matrix.
required_evidence: A real compatibility regression or version-specific dependency
deferred_gates.reconsider_when: The repository publishes a supported Python range or records a version-specific failure.
deferred_gates.owner_explanation_fa: تا زمانی که مشکل واقعی نسخه پایتون دیده نشده، ماتریس اضافه نمی‌شود.

limitations: Workflow telemetry is unavailable in this example.
